rater.labelLeakGuard: ratings are derived from metric/baseline/context fields; row-level Adsecute labels are HMAC-only in sample-200.json

rows.headline: Scale Fatiguing
rows.primaryReason: The creative has scale-level spend and purchase maturity, but recent ROAS is materially below the long-window read.

rows.headline: Needs Diagnosis
rows.primaryReason: Decision is blocked by context, source trust, or insufficient benchmark reliability; diagnose before applying a buyer action.

rows.headline: Test Inconclusive
rows.primaryReason: The creative has some signal but not enough clean relative evidence to promote, protect, refresh, or cut decisively.

rows.headline: Needs Diagnosis
rows.primaryReason: Decision is blocked by context, source trust, or insufficient benchmark reliability; diagnose before applying a buyer action.

rows.headline: Test Inconclusive
rows.primaryReason: The creative has some signal but not enough clean relative evidence to promote, protect, refresh, or cut decisively.

rows.headline: Scale Performer
rows.primaryReason: Spend and purchases are mature and efficiency is at or above benchmark, so preserve the winner unless validation supports more scale.

rows.headline: Test Inconclusive
rows.primaryReason: Spend or purchase evidence is below the minimum threshold, so the correct buyer move is to keep collecting signal.

rows.headline: Test Loser
rows.primaryReason: The test has enough spend to read, but conversion volume or efficiency is below the benchmark tolerance.

rows.headline: Test Inconclusive
rows.primaryReason: Spend or purchase evidence is below the minimum threshold, so the correct buyer move is to keep collecting signal.
